subject: Re: Deep Sea Fishing October
snippet: 17th works for me. Deposit is $225 this year.
body:
Amber - 17th works for me. Got the Marlin Hunter free that Saturday. Deposit is $225 this year - fuel surcharge bumped it from last season. Same Rudee slip, 7:30 departure. Bring your own rain gear.

Kevin Doyle
Master Captain, VB Fishing Charters

subject: Deep Sea Fishing October

body:
Kevin - any Saturdays open in October? Thinking the 17th. Need to know deposit so I can square it. How's the wreck bite been?

--Amber
